title: 🏠 Real Estate & Property Intelligence Engine
description:
🚀 Turn property news into actionable intelligence.

This Actor scrapes top real estate sources, analyzes sentiment using AI, and detects market-moving property events.

Quick Start: Select a Property Category and click Start. The results will appear in the Dataset tab.
📚 View Documentation

source.title: 📡 Property Category
source.description: Select the property sector to monitor. Use 'All' for a broad overview.
source.sectionDescription: Configure what data the AI should analyze.

country.title: 📍 Region Focus
country.description: Select a region to bias the search context and fallback mechanisms.

customFeedUrl.title: 🔗 Custom RSS Link
customFeedUrl.description: Paste a valid RSS URL here. ⚠️ Only used if 'News Category' is set to 'Custom URL'.

maxArticles.title: 🔢 Max Articles
maxArticles.description: Limit the number of articles to process to control costs and speed.

discordWebhookUrl.title: 🔔 Discord Webhook URL
discordWebhookUrl.description: Paste a Discord Webhook URL to receive real-time alerts for high-impact news (>60 score).
discordWebhookUrl.sectionDescription: Get alerted when market-moving news is detected.

adminMode.title: ⚙️ Admin Mode
adminMode.description: Trigger background data scraping and DB updates. Type 'true' here to run as admin.

runMode.title: ⚙️ Operation Mode
runMode.description:
SEARCH_ARTICLES: Search and retrieve analyzed news from the database.
PROPERTY_REPORT: Generates a high-level market summary.

startDate.title: 📅 Start Date
startDate.description: Optional: Only return results on or after this date (Format: YYYY-MM-DD)

runTestMode.title: 🧪 Test / QA Mode
runTestMode.description: Enable this to run a fast system check without using AI credits (returns dummy data).
